summary: The session counter divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in a session-limit error return; no session capacity behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 167: M	crates/net/network/src/session/counter.rs.

No current-count comparison, optional limit handling, or session-limit error behavior changed.
